question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6875 and 6899.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed at 6,824.66 on April 9th and has been trading around 6,609-6,825 recently, all well below the target range of 6875-6899.9999. The index would need to gain 4%+ to reach the lower bound, which is unlikely in normal market conditions. The 25-point target band represents less than 0.4% of the index value, making it a very narrow target even if the index were to rally significantly.
